content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run a Demand Planning discovery session for your OTC product.
New OTC launch — 1% hydrocortisone cream 30g, US drug store channel.
Initial stocking quantities and distribution channels?
CVS and Walgreens planogram entry. 15,000 units initial stocking across both chains.
Summer spike (insect bites/poison ivy season). API sourced from a single EU supplier with 10-week lead time.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
